starter.expected: Episode-split declaration, nominal support, changed-start first-departure, and assistance-label checks all print true.
starter.boundary: The lookup policy demonstrates evidence wiring; it is not the trained cloning model required by the capstone.

buildOrder: Validate lineage, units, targets, and masks
Branch the same policy into a changed-start rollout

acceptanceChecks.action: Check action units, target shifts, episode-end padding, and requested/applied ownership on hand examples.
acceptanceChecks.expected: All unpadded targets match the demonstrated applied actions and padded targets contribute zero loss.

acceptanceChecks.action: Restore model, optimizer, sampler, counters, and RNG immediately before an update.
acceptanceChecks.expected: The next batch IDs, loss, parameter hash, and counter match the uninterrupted branch.

acceptanceChecks.action: Run the unchanged accepted policy from nominal and +2 cm starts under paired simulator seeds.
acceptanceChecks.expected: Record support at every step, first state/action divergence, requested/applied commands, intervention, and final task/constraint outcome.

decision: The changed start exposes compounding error before task failure; nominal supervised evidence cannot establish recovery, and any later recovery-data addition must be analyzed as a separate training intervention.
failure: The first unsupported observation at step two and workspace exit at step five remain attached to requested/applied action provenance, policy revision, simulator seed, and external intervention ownership.
boundary: This deterministic trace is not a trained behavior-cloning measurement, general recovery result, physical-robot result, or evidence that the demonstrated support metric is complete for unseen states.
